issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or a reactive trigger matching 'When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck by your effect', not 'Activated'. This describes a response to a card return event.
Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' — duration must be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not omitted/Permanent. This is a critical duration violation.
Condition 'Always' is incomplete. Must include 'HasRestingDon' or similar condition to reflect 'When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck by your effect'.

Action 'GiveDon' is incomplete. Effect requires searching/playing from DON!! deck ('add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active'), which requires 'SearchDeck' or 'AttachDon' with source specification, not just 'GiveDon'.
'[Once Per Turn]' limitation is not encoded in DSL (no frequency limiting mechanism present).

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck by your effect, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.
